title: Redstone Detector
description: Adds an advanced new redstone block capable of detecting almost anything.
body:
This mod adds a new redstone block that is capable of detecting almost anything.  
To make it detect something, you need to right click on it and enter some "/execute" sub commands. If all condition(s) are true, it will emit a redstone signal with 15 power. Otherwise, it will emit nothing. You cannot use any sub commands that can cause a physical change in the world, such as "store" or "run". It can be used to make sorting systems, automatic doors, mob farms, and more!

tip: use MC Stacker -> "execute if entity" to help generate /execute sub commands or use the Minecraft Wiki.
